SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnimationTest
 
Frame
The Frame class holds all the information and methods to draw a frame onto the console
LinuxOS
This class has tools directly related to the Linux Operating System
MainTest
This Class only exists to test what would be impractical or impossible to test with junit
Keep in mind, that just because something says it passed doesn't mean it did, look for all visual cues that it passed to confirm
OS
This interface is built to hold all the methods that an operating system would need
output
This interface gives several powerful tools for quickly and easily writing to the console
TerminalImage
this object represents ascii art for the terminal
Timer
this class contains many static methods that make it easy to make the code wait a specified amount fo time
UsableOS<i>
this class is where all the operating system calls are done from, makes it easy to port to windows
